title: EVgo Inc. Reports Record Second Quarter 2024 Results
text: EVgo Inc. announced results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2024. The company delivered strong operational and financial performance. Revenue reached $66.6 million in Q2 2024, compared to $50.6 million in Q2 2023, representing 32% year-over-year growth. Network throughput increased to 66 GWh in Q2 2024, compared to 25 GWh in Q2 2023, representing 164% year-over-year growth. The company added over 131,000 new customer accounts during Q2 2024, a 60% year-over-year increase in new accounts, with overall customer accounts reaching more than 1 million at quarter end, an increase of 59% year-over-year. Utilization on the EVgo network in Q2 2024 was 20%, up from approximately 11% in Q2 2023. The company raised the midpoint of total revenue guidance by $10 million with total revenue guidance of $240-270 million for 2024. The strong Q2 results demonstrated robust execution and network expansion.
